proposal.claim: TEE non-equivocation makes vote signatures redundant
proposal.structural_delta: message size: remove sig from votes. protocol complexity: remove verification step
proposal.diff:
--- a/leader_election.tla
+++ b/leader_election.tla
 HandleVote(replica, candidate) ==
-  /\ VerifySignature(replica, <<"vote", candidate>>)
-  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![candidate] = votes[candidate] \cup {<<replica, Sign(...)>>}]
+  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![candidate] = votes[candidate] \cup {replica}]

review.argument: TEE non-equivocation prevents conflicting votes. signature was only for authenticity, which TEE provides.

judgment.reasoning: trust model explicitly includes TEE non-equivocation

structural_verification.evidence: vote messages no longer carry signatures
